projects.title: salitAI.orbit
projects.impact: AI takes the notes so the whole team can focus on the actual meeting.
projects.outcome: Task ownership and deadlines are extracted automatically from meeting content.
projects.description: salitAI.orbit captures spoken discussion, transforms it into structured notes, and highlights assigned action items with due dates so that teams leave every meeting with clarity.
highlights: Designed a cleaner meeting-to-action workflow instead of raw transcript dumping.
Focused on usability so non-technical users can immediately understand outputs.
Structured result cards for owners, tasks, and deadlines for stronger accountability.

projects.title: MorionKnow.AI
projects.impact: Preserves and shares cultural knowledge through AI-powered documentation.
projects.outcome: Communities can document, preserve, and share their cultural heritage digitally.
projects.description: MorionKnow.AI is a cultural preservation platform that uses AI to help communities document, organize, and share their cultural knowledge, traditions, and heritage through intelligent conversations and smart recommendations.
highlights: Built intelligent conversation flow for cultural knowledge documentation.
Designed accessible interface for community-driven content creation.
Focused on preserving cultural heritage through modern technology.

projects.title: Coral.orbit
projects.impact: Supports marine conservation efforts in Marinduque through accessible research tools.
projects.outcome: DOST Marinduque researchers can document and track coral health more effectively.
projects.description: Coral.orbit is a mobile marine research app developed for DOST Marinduque, designed for coral mapping and enabling researchers to document coral health, track changes over time, and contribute to local marine conservation efforts.
highlights: Developed for DOST Marinduque marine conservation initiatives.
Designed for offline-first data collection with sync capabilities.
Built with local marine research and conservation workflows in mind.

projects.title: Waymark
projects.impact: Streamlines project management and tracking for DOST Marinduque initiatives.
projects.outcome: Teams can monitor project progress, milestones, and deliverables more effectively.
projects.description: Waymark is a mobile project tracking app developed for DOST Marinduque that simplifies project management by organizing tasks, tracking milestones, and providing clear visibility into project status and team progress.
highlights: Developed for DOST Marinduque project management needs.
Designed around simplification of project tracking workflows.
Focused on clear visibility and team collaboration features.

projects.title: PawPrint AI
projects.impact: Provides intelligent pet care guidance and support for pet owners.
projects.outcome: Pet owners can access AI-powered advice for better pet care decisions.
projects.description: PawPrint AI is an intelligent pet care assistant that helps pet owners make informed decisions about their pets' health, nutrition, and well-being through AI-powered conversations and personalized recommendations.
highlights: Built AI-powered conversation system for pet care guidance.
Designed intuitive interface for pet owners of all experience levels.
Focused on providing reliable and helpful pet care information.
